steps.title: Spot the temporal structure
steps.content: The passage calls her a “contemporary” author and immediately establishes Hawaiian literary heritage through historical examples (traditional stories, past writers). The blank must express how her present-day work relates to this past tradition.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: ”Preceded by” expresses that her work comes after the heritage chronologically, placing it within an established tradition. The alternatives fail: “summarized” (heritage doesn't condense her work), “supplanted” (heritage didn't replace her), and “overlooked” (contradicts her being celebrated). That matches choice A — A is correct.
